data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING DDC Chairwoman's Letter: Record FY2025, 2,383 BTC, and an AI Operating System Built for Bitcoin Treasuries
data.description: In a recent update dated April 21, 2026, it was reported that core sales and marketing expenses decreased by 54%, while general and administrative expenses saw a decline of 44.4%. The revised release highlights DDC Enterprise's achievements in fiscal year 2025, including doubling Bitcoin holdings to 2,383 BTC, leading to a top-30 global ranking. Additionally, the company launched an AI operating system tailored for efficient Bitcoin treasury management. These developments were emphasized in the DDC Chairwoman's letter.

data.title: CleanMyMac by MacPaw Report: 7 in 10 Mac Users Would Clean Cloud Storage More Often If They Knew Its Environmental Cost
data.description: In honor of Earth Day, MacPaw conducted a survey of 1,000 Mac users to explore their digital habits, emotional clutter, and the potential impact of environmental awareness on cleanup behavior. The global technology company based in KYIV, Ukraine, aims to reshape user behavior in alignment with environmental sustainability. This initiative reflects a growing trend towards integrating eco-consciousness into everyday tech usage.

data.title: Smartstream Research Reveals Five Realities Redefining Buy-Side Reconciliations
data.description: London-based Smartstream, a data solutions provider for top global financial institutions and enterprises, has revealed fresh data from its recent study, "Smart Reconciliations: The Buy-Side Perspective." The report showcases significant changes impacting reconciliation, control, and operational assurance within buy-side companies. This information is drawn from discussions with senior operations executives in asset management and investment firms.

data.title: iScreen Leads App Store Graphics & Design Category With Its All-in-One Aesthetic Ecosystem for iOS 26
data.description: Qimai data indicates impressive worldwide rankings for iScreen, which offers a cohesive aesthetic experience in line with the latest iOS 26 design themes. In Los Angeles on April 22, 2026, it was reported that the adoption of iOS 26 is rapidly increasing due to its innovative "Liquid Glass" design approach. This trend is reflected in the home screens of iPhones, showcasing a unified and modernized look.

data.title: Infortrend Recognized in CRN's Storage 100 as One of The 50 Coolest Software-Defined Storage Vendors for 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Infortrend Technology, Inc. (TWSE: 2495), a prominent enterprise storage and AI solutions provider based in Taipei, revealed its inclusion in the 2026 CRN Storage 100 list. The company secured a spot as one of the top 50 Coolest Software-Defined Storage Vendors. This recognition highlights Infortrend's position as a key player in the industry and showcases its dedication to innovation in the storage sector.

data.title: Paysafe Introduces PaysafeWallet, the Digital Wallet Built for the Experience Economy
data.description: Today in London, Paysafe (NYSE: PSFE) launched PaysafeWallet, a digital wallet aimed at aiding cash and digital-preferred consumers in managing their finances in the experience economy. Through PaysafeWallet, users can send, receive, spend, and withdraw money using a dedicated IBAN-enabled personal payment account and debit card. This offering marks the advancement of PaysafeCard's Account & Card into a comprehensive digital financial solution.

data.title: ‘Concrete in Life 2025/26’ Winners Announced – Spectacular Photographs From Around the World
data.description: In London, winners have been announced for the Concrete in Life 2025/26 global photography competition, organized by the Global Cement and Concrete Association (GCCA). Over 20,000 entries were submitted from around the world, displaying concrete's vital role in daily life, infrastructure, cities, and design. The competition welcomed submissions from professionals, amateurs, and smartphone users worldwide. The selected powerful and captivating images highlight the widespread importance of concrete in various aspects of society.

data.title: Bitcoin's price is surging, but experts predict it may peak around $84,000 due to average spot BTC ETF cost basis.
data.description: According to analysts, the recent surge in Bitcoin indicates the beginning of a rally. However, they suggest that the potential upside may be limited, with an average spot cost basis for Bitcoin ETF reaching around $84,000.

data.title: Node4 Appoints New CEO and Chair to Drive Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In Derby, England, Node4 has appointed Neil Muller as Group Chief Executive Officer and Patrick De Smedt as Non-Executive Chair. The company, a top AI Business Solutions and Managed Service Provider, is gearing up for growth under their leadership. Node4 aims to assist customers in achieving greater success through secure, connected, and intelligent technology. With a focus on unlocking full potential, Neil Muller takes on his role to drive the company forward.

data.title: Omdia: Emerging TV OS Platforms Forecast to Capture 28% of European Market by 2030
data.description: In London, it has been reported that TV Operating Systems that were non-existent in 2022 are predicted to dominate 28% of the European TV OS market by 2030, a significant increase from the 21% share held in 2025. This data comes from Omdia’s TV Design & Features Tracker, highlighting the evolving landscape where TV manufacturers are placing greater emphasis on generating income from advertising on the TV OS rather than hardware sales. Currently in Europe, Google TV holds the top position with a 32% market share, though it is projected to face competition from three main rivals as it gradually loses its market share.

data.title: Yugabyte Signs Strategic Collaboration Agreement with AWS to Deliver Enterprise PostgreSQL Modernization
data.description: Yugabyte, a distributed SQL database firm based in Sunnyvale, California, has revealed a strategic collaboration agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS). The partnership aims to aid enterprises in updating their outdated databases and expanding cloud-native applications on AWS. Yugabyte's offerings include high availability, global distribution, and operational resilience. The company is leveraging its existing customer base, which includes over 30 enterprises in sectors such as financial services, technology, and gaming that currently utilize Yugabyte's services.
